auth_required_sync: Yinjira ngo ubike amasambu yawe kuri Tracebud.
backup_body_plots: Ohereza amasambu n'isarura ryawe kuri Tracebud mu gihe uri ku murongo.
declaration_audit_body: Yohereza incamake ya JSON y'amakuru y'umuhinzi n'umubare w'amasambu ku bw'ububiko bwawe, cyangwa uyohereze mu bitabo by'igenzura rya Tracebud mu gihe winjiye.
declaration_export_no_farmer: Banza utunganye umwirondoro w'umuhinzi muri 'Sajili isambu' mbere.
declaration_sync_failed: Ntabwo byashobotse kwandika ibyabaye mu igenzura.
declaration_sync_need_signin: Yinjira ukitumia imeli n'ijambo ry'ibanga rya Tracebud.
declaration_sync_ok_body: Incamake y'ihitamo yongewe mu bitabo by'igenzura rya seva.
declaration_sync_server: Tuma incamake mu igenzura rya Tracebud
declaration_text: Ntangaje ko nta shyamba ryasenywe kuri iyi sambu nyuma ya tariki 31 Ukuboza 2020.
delete_plot_body: Ese ufite ubushake bwo gusiba isambu yawe? Amakuru yose n'umusaruro bijyanye nayo bizasibwa burundu.
documents_add_tenure: Ongera gihamya y'uburyo bwo gutunga ubutaka
documents_fpic_body: Imyanzuro y'amanama, amakarita, amasezerano rusange, n'ibimenyetso by'ubwumvikane.
documents_labor_body: Amafoto n'inyandiko z'imimerere y'akazi n'ibimenyetso by'iyubahirizwa ry'amategeko y'abakozi.
documents_my_docs_body: Bika kandi utunganye inyandiko za FPIC, uburenganzira ku butaka, impushya, n'iyubahirizwa ry'amategeko y'abakozi.
documents_no_farmer: Banza utunganye umwirondoro wawe w'umuhinzi (sajili isambu kuri Ahabanza).
documents_no_plots: Nta masambu y'imbere arahari. Banza usajili isambu.
documents_permits_body: Impushya z'uturere tw'ubwishingizi bwa SINAPH, gahunda z'icunga, n'impushya za leta.
documents_plots_body: Fungura isambu ngo ucunge inyandiko z'uburenganzira ku butaka, impushya, ububiko bwa FPIC, n'ubuzigamo bw'amafoto.
documents_tenure_body: Inyandiko z'uburenganzira ku butaka, amasezerano gakondo, amabarwa y'akarere, n'ubuhamya bw'abatangabuhamya.
enter_email_password: Inshingamo imeli n'ijambo ry'ibanga rya Tracebud.
evidence_pick_failed_body: Chagua ifoto mu bubiko bwawe cyangwa ufate ifoto nshya.
evidence_pick_failed_title: Ntabwo byashobotse gufungura igikoresho cyo guhitamo amadosiye
finish_home_first: Kamilisha imiterere ku gice cy'Ahabanza mbere.
finish_home_photo: Kamilisha imiterere ku gice cy'Ahabanza mbere — hanyuma ushobora kongeraho ifoto y'umwirondoro hapa.
fpic_label: Ubutaka ntibutwarwa nta masezerano yo ku bushake, akiri kare kandi amenyeshejwe (FPIC).
harvest_backup_first: Banza ubike iyi sambu kuri Tracebud mbere yo kwandika umusaruro.
harvest_logged_body: Inyemezarisiti ya kidijitali yakozwe kandi ibikwa kuri aka gikoresho.
harvest_plot_local_badge: Kuri aka gikoresho gusa — bika munsi y'Amasambu Yanjye ngo usajili mu gihe uri ku murongo
home_action_plot_photos: Isambu “{name}” ikeneye amafoto y'ukuri kw'ubutaka ngo ikamilishe igenzura ry'iyubahirizwa ry'amategeko.
home_backup_tap: Fungura Igenamiterere ngo ubike kuri seva
labor_no_child: Nta gukoresha abana akazi kuri iyi sambu.
labor_no_forced: Nta gukoreshwa akazi ku nguvu cyangwa icuruzwa ry'abantu kuri iyi sambu.
log_harvest_card_sub: Sajili ibiro hanyuma ukore inyemezarisiti y'iyubahirizwa ry'amategeko ku bw'umuguzi wawe.
no_synced_plots: Nta masambu yabitswe kuri seva arahari. Nenda mu Masambu Yanjye ubanze ubike.
onboarding_next_body_name: Kugira ngo amasambu yawe n'inyandiko z'umusaruro byerekane umuhinzi nyawe ku nyemezarisiti n'amatebanyarwanda.
onboarding_next_body_plot: Genda ukorera isambu yawe ukitumia GPS ngo upime umupaka. Inafanya kazi hanze y'umurongo — konti ntishyize ahagaragara bado.
perm_camera_body: Ruhusu uburyo bwa kamera ngo ufatwe ifoto y'umwirondoro.
perm_library_body: Ruhusu uburyo bw'ububiko bw'amafoto ngo ushyireho ifoto yawe y'umwirondoro.
plot_boundary_required_body: Amasambu ya hegitari 4 cyangwa zirenga akeneye umupaka wapimwe ufite nibura utwiciro dutatu twa GPS.
plot_deforestation_passed_body: Nta gukurwaho kw'ishyamba kwabonetse kuva ku ya 31 Ukuboza 2020
plot_deforestation_pending_body: Isubiramo rirakenewe mbere y'uruhushya rw'iyubahirizwa ry'amategeko
plot_edit_declared_discrepancy: Eneo ryatangajwe rinyuranye na GPS ku kigero kirenze 5%.
plot_edit_declared_hint: Ku bw'amahitamo. Niba eneo rya GPS ryeretswe, iryatangajwe rigomba kuba riri mu kigero cya 5% cyaryo.
plot_geometry_error_title: Amakuru ya GPS ntabwo ari yo
plot_photo_intro: Aya mafoto afite ikimenyetso cy'igihe n'ahantu akoreshwa nk'icyimenyetso mu gihe cy'igenzura rya EU nko kwerekana ibikorwa by'ubuhinzi bitandukanye n'isenywa ry'amashyamba.
plot_rename_backend_reason: Jina ry'isambu ryasasishijwe kuva ku miterere y'isambu muri porogaramu
plot_rename_local_only: Imebadilishwa jina kuri aka gikoresho. Nakala ya seva ntibyashobotse gusasishwa.
plot_saved_sign_in_body: Yinjira ngo ubike nakala y'iyi sambu kuri Tracebud hanyuma usangire n'ubufatanye bwawe.
plot_status_all_done: Ibice byose by'urutonde byakamilishijwe ku bw'iki gihe.
plot_status_fpic_hint: Ohereza gihamya y'ububiko bwa FPIC ku bw'eneo gakondo ryeretswe.
plot_status_ground_hint: Fungura Ubuzigamo bw'Amafoto hanyuma ufate ifoto imwe ku bw'uri buri ruhande (Amajyaruguru, Iburasirazuba, Amajyepfo, Iburengerazuba).
plot_status_land: Inyandiko y'uburenganzira ku butaka & gihamya y'uburyo bwo gutunga
plot_status_land_hint: Ohereza inyandiko z'iyandikishwa cyangwa iz'akarere muri Inyandiko z'Ubutaka.
plot_status_permit_hint: Ohereza uruhushya cyangwa gahunda y'icunga ku bw'isano y'eneo rwarengewe.
plot_status_remaining_hint: Gusa ikipengele ngo ufungure igice ukeneye.
plot_status_subtitle: Niki gisigaye ku bw'iyubahirizwa ry'amategeko kuri iyi sambu
plot_status_sync_hint: Yinjira kandi ubike nakala kuva mu Masambu Yanjye ngo iyi sambu ibikwe mu gihe uri ku murongo.
plot_sync_note: Backup y'isambu ikoresha iyi konti. Ondoka ngo ukoreshe ikonti yandukanye.
plot_upload_network_error: Ntabwo bishoboka guhuza na Tracebud. Bika nakala y'iyi sambu kuva mu Masambu Yanjye mu gihe uri ku murongo.
plot_upload_server_error: Seva yanze ikurwa. Fungura Amasambu Yanjye ngo ugerageze kandi ubike nakala.
plot_voucher_body: Iyi kodi ya QR ni gihamya yawe ya kidijitali y'iyubahirizwa ry'amategeko. Sangira n'umuguzi uwo ari we wese ngo wemeze ko isambu yawe yuzuza ibisabwa na EUDR.
plots_empty_body: Sajili isambu ngo uchore ikarita y'isambu yawe ya mbere.
plots_local_mode: Hujaingia — amasambu yawe abitswe kuri aka gikoresho.
producer_profile_error_uuid: Imiterere y'ikonti ntijyanye. Sura amakuru yawe hanyuma ugerageze kandi.
producer_profile_missing_farmer: Umwirondoro w'umuhinzi ntabwo uboneka. Nenda inyuma ukamilishe umwirondoro w'umuhinzi mbere.
settings_account_signed_out_body: Yinjira ngo ubike nakala y'amasambu n'umusaruro ukitumia ikonti yawe ya Tracebud.
settings_api_url_hint: Kwenye terefoni cyangwa mudasobwa igendanwa, tumia anuani ya LAN ya mudasobwa yawe (mfano http://192.168.1.10:4000/api), si localhost. Weka EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL hanyuma uwashe kandi Expo.
settings_backup_sync_body: Ohereza amasambu, umusaruro, n'amafoto kuri Tracebud mu gihe uri ku murongo.
settings_vertex_avg_body: Dirisha rya sampuli ry'ifatizo mu gihe cy'gukora akaciro k'idatandukana ku ikarita (SIG EUDR, itangwa rigereranijwe). Bado ushobora guhitamo undi mwanya ku bw'uri buri kiciro.
sign_in_sub: Tumia imeli n'ijambo ry'ibanga nk'irya ikonti yawe ya Tracebud. Inahifadhiwa kuri aka gikoresho gusa.
sign_in_to_backup_body: Tumia imeli n'ijambo ry'ibanga rya Tracebud ngo woroherezwe kohereza amasambu no kubika nakala y'umusaruro.
simplified_declaration_capture_gps: Bika GPS y'iki gihe ku bw'ihitamo
simplified_declaration_geo_body: Ku bw'abahinzi bacye/bato ushobora gushyira ihitamo ryoroshye ku kiciro kimwe cya GPS (WGS84 y'ibisigo bitandatu) mu mwanya cyangwa hamwe n'anwani ya posta.
simplified_declaration_location_denied: Uruhushya rw'ahantu rurakenewe ngo ubike akaciro ka GPS k'ihitamo.
simplified_declaration_location_failed: Ntabwo byashobotse gusoma eneo rya GPS.
simplified_declaration_postal_ph: Umudugudu, akarere, intara — ku bw'ihitamo ryoroshye
sync_no_farmer_profile: Nta mwirondoro w'umuhinzi uri kuri aka gikoresho. Kamilisha imiterere y'Ahabanza mbere.
sync_plots_already_synced: Imipaka yose y'amasambu ya tayari iri kuri seva.
sync_plots_fetch_failed: Ntabwo byashobotse guhuza na API ya Tracebud mu gihe cy'gukora amasambu.
sync_plots_none: Nta mipaka y'imbere y'amasambu yo koherezwa.
sync_plots_uploaded_all: Imeupakia {uploaded} kuri {total} y'amasambu yabuze kuri seva.
sync_queue_attempt_scope_first: Upeo w'igerageza፦ igerageza rya mbere gusa
sync_queue_attempt_scope_retrying: Upeo w'igerageza፦ ikirimo kugerageza kandi gusa
sync_queue_attempt_scope_smart: Upeo w'igerageza፦ ukaguzi w'ubwenge (ikirimo kugerageza kandi hanyuma igerageza rya mbere), umupaka {cap}
sync_queue_dropped_invalid: Imeondoa ibyinjijwe {n} bitari byo mu murongo.
sync_queue_failed_remain: Ibice {n} by'umurongo byafeli — sura umuhuza kandi ugerageze kandi.
sync_queue_fetch_failed: Ntabwo byashobotse gupakia amasambu ya seva — umusaruro utegereje, amafoto, cyangwa inyandiko ntibyoherejwe.
sync_queue_health_summary: Afya y'umurongo፦ {pending} zitegereje, {retrying} zinarisoma kandi, igerageza ryo hejuru cyane፦ {max}
sync_queue_no_action_selected: Igerageza ry'umurongo ryavukwa፦ nta bwoko bw'gikorwa cyahitamo.
sync_queue_preferences_reset: Mapendeleo y'gukora kandi umurongo yarudishijwe mu miterere y'ifatizo.
sync_queue_sent: Imetuma ibice {n} bitegereje (umusaruro, amafoto, cyangwa inyandiko).
sync_queue_smart_cap_reached: Umupaka w'ukaguzi w'ubwenge wagezweho mu cyiciro cya 1/2; icyiciro cya 2/2 cyavukwa.
sync_queue_smart_pass_first: Ukaguzi w'ubwenge icyiciro cya 2/2፦ ibice by'igerageza rya mbere
sync_queue_smart_pass_retrying: Ukaguzi w'ubwenge icyiciro cya 1/2፦ ikirimo kugerageza kandi ibice
sync_session_expired_short: Umwanya w'igihe urarangiye. Yinjira kandi mu Igenamiterere.
tile_need_plot_body: Chora ikarita y'isambu yawe mbere yo gufungura iki gice.
voucher_share_failed: Uburyo bwo gusangira ntibwashobotse gufungurwa. Gerageza kandi.
walk_area_discrepancy_body: Eneo rya GPS ({gps} ha) n'iryo ryatangajwe ({declared} ha) binyuranye ku kigero cya {pct}%, ikizirengeje ukwihanganira kwa 5%.
walk_averaging_body: Kugira wastani ku sekunde 60–120 ngo kiyungururwe amakosa y'isano y'itumanaho (multipath)
walk_capture_intro: Hitamo uko unasa imipaka y'isambu yawe፦
walk_completion_body: Isambu yawe yabitswe kuri aka gikoresho kandi izashyirwa kuri seva mu gihe uri ku murongo.
walk_contiguity_body: Amasambu yatandukanyijwe n'imihanda, imigezi, cyangwa gari ya moshi agomba gusajiliwa nk'amasambu atandukanye afite GeoID z'umwihariko.
walk_decl_documents_hint: Inyandiko z'ubufasha zishobora kurengerwa mu gice cya Inyandiko nyuma y'iyandikishwa.
walk_decl_fpic_body: Uruhushya rwo ku bushake, akiri kare kandi amenyeshejwe rwayobowe ku bw'imiryango yagezweho n'ingaruka
walk_decl_labor_body: Nta gukoresha abana akazi, akazi ku nguvu, cyangwa imimerere idatekanye y'akazi
walk_decl_land_tenure_body: Nfite uburenganzira bw'amategeko bwo gukoresha ubutaka ubu (inyandiko y'uburenganzira, itungwa, cyangwa amasezerano gakondo)
walk_decl_no_deforestation_body: Iyi sambu ntabwo yasenywe amashyamba nyuma ya tariki 31 Ukuboza 2020
walk_declarations_required_body: Ubuhamya ubu burakenewe ku bw'iyubahirizwa ry'amategeko rya EUDR n'uburyo bwo kwinjira mu isoko rya EU.
walk_declared_area_label: Eneo ryatangajwe (hegitari, ku bw'amahitamo, ubunyurane butarenze 5%)
walk_draw_info: Chora umupaka w'isambu yawe ku ikarita ya satelite. Bana ikirahuri ngo gikuze kandi ukore ku ikarita ngo wongeyeho utwiciro.
walk_gps_averaging_body: Uri buri buryo bw'umupaka bufata wastan wa sekunde 60+ z'isomwa ngo buhure n'isano y'amababi y'ibiti. Genda gahoro kandi mu buryo buhamye.
walk_instructions_body:
1) Tegereza kugeza ikimenyetso cya GPS kibe Ikigereranyo cyangwa Gukomera.
2) Gusa Anza Kusajili.
3) Genda ukorera umupaka wose w'isambu.
4) Subira ku kiciro cyo kuanza ngo ufunge isura.
5) Bika mu gihe eneo rigereranijwe riboneka nk'iryo ryo.
walk_invalid_boundary_body: Poligoni inyuramo ubwayo. Tafadhali genda kandi umupaka.
walk_invalid_declared_body: Tafadhali inshingamo inomero nziza ku bw'hegitari zitatangajwe.
walk_low_data_desc: Koresha ikarita idafite amakuru ngo ugabanye ikoreshwa rya interineti; yatsa amashusho ya hanze y'umurongo ku bw'amakarita yose ya hanze y'umurongo.
walk_method_centroid_body: Ku bw'amasambu ari munsi ya hegitari 4, nasa akaciro kamwe ko hagati kagereranijwe mu mwanya w'umupaka wose.
walk_method_draw_body: Chora n'amaboko imipaka y'isambu yawe ku mashusho ya satelite ya hanze y'umurongo mu gihe GPS idapfutse.
walk_method_walk_body: Genda ukorera isambu yawe mu gihe GPS isajili utwiciro tw'imipaka mu buryo bw'wastani ngo buyejuru isano y'amababi y'ibiti.
walk_offline_tiles: Amashusho ya satelite ya hanze y'umurongo yashizwemo
walk_photo_vault_body: Fata picha ku bw'uri buri ruhande ngo wemeze ikoreshwa ry'ubutaka mu gihe cy'igenzura ry'iyubahirizwa ry'amategeko.
walk_plot_registration_body: Sajili isambu yawe ku bw'uhakiki w'iyubahirizwa ry'amategeko rya EUDR n'uburyo bwo kwinjira mu isoko.
walk_plot_saved_point_body: {name} ibitswe hagereranijwe akaciro kamwe ka GPS.
walk_plot_updated_point_body: Eneo ribitswe kuri aka gikoresho. Bika nakala kuva mu Masambu Yanjye niba iyi sambu yari yarashizwemo mbere.
walk_plot_updated_polygon_body: Imipaka ibitswe kuri aka gikoresho. Bika nakala kuva mu Masambu Yanjye niba iyi sambu yari yarashizwemo mbere.
walk_poor_gps_body: Usahihi wa GPS ni muto. Bado ushobora kubika, ariko utekereze genda kandi umupaka ku bw'usahihi mwiza.
walk_registration_completed_body: Imipaka y'isambu yawe yanasanzwe. Endelea ku bw'amahitamo ngo ukamilishe ihitamo ry'asabwa.
